title: Qwen3-TTS
description: Voice cloning TTS with Qwen3-TTS — Fast inference on RunPod Serverless with CUDA graph acceleration

input.name: Voice Map URL
input.description: URL to a JSON voicemap file. See README for format.

input.name: Use RunPod Cached Model
input.description: Load model from RunPod's cached model store. Set 'Model' field on endpoint to Qwen/Qwen3-TTS-12Hz-1.7B-Base to enable.

input.name: Use Network Volume for Cache
input.description: Store HuggingFace cache on network volume instead of container disk.
